title: Central Bank of Ireland grants dual authorisation to stablecoin provider Confirmo
snippet: Confirmo, a stablecoin-first payment platform serving businesses globally, today announces that its Irish entity, Confirmo Limited, has received authorisation as Payment Institution under the Payment Services Regulations 2018 (PSR) from the Central Bank of Ireland (CBI).

title: US Treasury unveils proposed stablecoin rules targeting money laundering, sanctions
snippet: The U.S. Treasury's sanctions agency and its financial crimes bureau released a joint rule proposal for stablecoin issuers.

title: RWA network Pharos lands a $1 billion valuation in $44M funding round ahead of mainnet debut
Treasury Proposes Anti-Money Laundering Framework for Stablecoin Issuers
snippet: The Treasury Department has proposed a rule that would require permitted payment stablecoin issuers (PPSIs) to adhere to anti-money laundering (AML) and sanctions compliance obligations. The proposal was included in a joint proposed rule issued Wednesday (April 8) by Treasury’s Financial Crimes Enfo

title: US Treasury proposes GENIUS Act rules targeting illicit finance
snippet: The proposed rule would direct payment stablecoin issuers to establish AML/CFT and sanctions compliance programs, and be able to “block, freeze, and reject” certain transactions.

title: FDIC approves US Stablecoins Act
snippet: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) Board of Directors today approved a notice of proposed rulemaking that would implement certain requirements and standards under the Guiding and Establishing National Innovation for U.S. Stablecoins Act (GENIUS Act).

title: Treasury Outlines How Stablecoin Rules Will Fight Illicit Finance Under GENIUS Act
snippet: The proposed rule prohibits people with criminal backgrounds from serving as the head of stablecoin issuers’ compliance programs.

title: Dubai clarifies token issuance rules for RWAs and stablecoins
snippet: Dubai’s regulator issued new guidance placing token launches into three buckets, tightening disclosure and governance standards for stablecoins, RWAs and other digital assets.

title: Polygon Labs seeking to raise up to $100 million for stablecoin payments business: report
snippet: The crypto firm aims to sell "between $50 million and $100 million in equity" in the new stablecoin payments business.

title: Canton Network powers real-time collateral movement with Transcend
snippet: Transcend, a leader in collateral and liquidity optimization technology, announced it has connected to the Canton Network to enable real-time mobility of tokenized assets.

snippet: Empty tankers will reportedly be permitted to pass through the waterway under the US-Iran deal, but certain ships will need to pay a tariff of $1 per barrel of oil in Bitcoin.

snippet: A White House report found that banning stablecoin yield products would boost community bank lending by just 0.02%.

title: Stablecoin yields won’t harm banks, White House economists say

title: Instant settlement strains crypto’s capital efficiency: Ethan Buchman
snippet: Crypto trades settle instantly, but at the cost of capital efficiency. This forces firms to overcollateralize and limits how far markets can scale, says Cosmos co-founder Ethan Buchman.
